#+TITLE: Calendar event fixtures
#+CATEGORY: Fixtures

* single date
  <2026-04-18 Sat>

* date with time
  <2026-04-18 Sat 14:30>

* time range same day
  <2026-04-18 Sat 14:30-16:00>

* range across midnight
  <2026-04-18 Sat 19:00>--<2026-04-19 Sun 01:00>

* multi-day range
  <2026-04-18 Sat>--<2026-04-22 Wed>

* repeater weekly
  <2026-04-18 Sat +1w>

* repeater catch-up
  <2026-04-18 Sat ++1m>

* repeater restart
  <2026-04-18 Sat .+1d>

* warning period
  <2026-04-18 Sat -3d>

* scheduled only
  SCHEDULED: <2026-04-18 Sat>

* deadline with warning
  DEADLINE: <2026-04-25 Sat -3d>

* scheduled with repeater
  SCHEDULED: <2026-04-18 Sat .+1d>

* multiple timestamps in body
  First <2026-04-18 Sat> then <2026-04-20 Mon 10:00>.

* inactive timestamp in body
  Created [2026-04-10 Fri] — meeting <2026-04-18 Sat>

* event with location
  <2026-04-18 Sat 19:00>--<2026-04-19 Sun 01:00>
  39784 Bissy Common Fremont, CA 94548
